name: libtype-tiny-perl
title: libtype-tiny-perl
description:
tiny, yet Moo(se)-compatible type constraint
Type::Tiny is a tiny class
for creating Moose-like type constraint objects
which are compatible with Moo, Moose and Mouse.
.
This package also includes Types::Standard,
a Moose-inspired library of useful type constraints,
and Type::Params, to allow very fast checking and coercion
of function and method parameters.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtype-tiny-perl because tiny, yet Moo(se)-compatible type constraint.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtype-tiny-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtype-tiny-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtype-tiny-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
